ops.text:
PRE-REGISTRATION (before any LLM spend).

GOAL: Confident-learning (CL) label-noise audit over the training labels, then verify the flagged suspects by re-judging at opus. Cap $10.

POPULATION: the current-version (PROMPT_VERSION=6) triage verdicts in the snapshot feedback.db, one per dedup_key (N=5756 judged, non-quarantined). Binary label = is_steering (category in STEERING_CATEGORIES). This is the label source the whole downstream pipeline (watcher label, refine, dataset) rests on and is 1:1 re-judgeable via dedup_key. NOTE the v6 labels are mixed-model: opus 4692 / gpt-5.5:medium 1056 / gemini-3.5-pro 8; parquet transcript_message negatives are structural sampled windows (NOT judged) so the triage-label grain is the correct re-judgeable population, not the post-curation watcher parquet.

METHOD (CL):
1. Features = TF-IDF over feedback_events.text (word 1-2grams) + source_kind one-hot. Deliberately EXCLUDE category (label is a deterministic function of category -> leakage).
2. Out-of-sample predicted probs via 5-fold StratifiedKFold logistic regression (cross-validated; seed 1729).
3. cleanlab (uv run --with cleanlab): estimate the 2x2 confident-joint / noise matrix; rank label issues by self-confidence label-quality score.
4. Rank all N by CL label-quality; take top-100 suspects (most-likely-mislabeled).
5. Cross-ref E18/E13 unreliable strata IF their row lists exist (E18/out empty at start -> skip, optional).

RE-JUDGE (verification): fresh cp -c clone of feedback.db; delete the v6 triage rows for exactly the top-100 suspect dedup_keys; targeted re-judge those 100 via the production triage judge (JUDGE_PROMPT, PROMPT_VERSION=6, tier=large -> resolved_model=opus, structured Verdict) x1. Compare re-judged is_steering vs original.

PRE-REGISTERED SUCCESS: >=60% of flagged suspects flip on re-judge (re-judge precision = fraction of top-100 whose re-judged is_steering != original is_steering). Report point estimate + bootstrap CI. This experiment carries a hard criterion (NOT PENDING-E15), so criterion_met verdict is in scope.

OUTPUTS: ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E20/out/cleaned-labels.parquet (dedup_key grain: original + cleaned label, cl_flagged, cl_score, rejudged fields) for E28; suspects table with per-row original/re-judged labels; 2x2 noise matrix.

HARD RULES honored: read-only snapshot; all writes to E20/out and cloned dbs (chmod u+w); every cc-steer mutation passes --no-sync; fresh clone for the re-judge (E8 no shared vote cache); eval "$(ccp env)" before LLM calls; judge at opus.
